texto: Imagine a computer. The monitor, keyboard, and processor are the hardware. Without any software to run it, your computer would be worthless. Your body is your hardware and your mindset is your operating system. It gives you access to the power of the hardware, and determines what software you can run. It lets you get the most out of your computer, allowing you to balance your checkbook and even create 3-D designs. Your mindset determines how you perceive and interact with the world.
explicacao: Citação de Mike Cernovich sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Imagine a computer. The monitor, keyboard, and processor are the hardware.
